parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ body: '🤝 PREMIUM VENDOR MATCH FOR APPROVAL

📋 Lead ID: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.lead_id + ' ⭐ PREMIUM
👤 Vendor: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_name + ' (' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_id + ')

Match Score: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.match_score + '/100
Compatibility: ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.compatibility_score + '/100

AI Recommendation: ' + ($('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.compatibility_score >= 70 ? '✅ APPROVE' : $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.compatibility_score >= 50 ? '⚠️ REVIEW' : '❌ CONSIDER DECLINE') + '

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Actions (SLA: 2 hours):
CONNECT ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.lead_id + ' ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_id + '
DECLINE ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.lead_id + ' ' + $('Merge Vendor Interest').item.json.vendorInterest.vendor_id }) }}

parameters.name: filters

parameters.name: filters
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const ad = JSON.parse($("State Machine").item.json.actionData || "{}"); const base = [["lead_type","=",ad.category],["status","in",["Posted to Groups","Introductions Sent - Awaiting Vendor Response","Has Interested Vendors"]]]; if (!ad.isPremium && ad.cityState) { const city = (ad.cityState || "").split(",")[0].trim(); if (city) base.push(["location","like","%"+city+"%"]); } return JSON.stringify(base); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={"current_step": "LEAD_SELECT", "session_data": {{ JSON.stringify($("Format Category Lead List").item.json.sessionData) }}}

={{ (() => { const sm = $("State Machine").first().json; const isPrem = sm.memberTier === "PREMIUM"; const tierNote = isPrem ? "

⭐ *Premium Access:* Search all leads across India" : "

⚠️ *Free Tier:* Search limited to your industry + city
💡 Upgrade to Premium for full access"; const body = "🔍 *FIND LEAD*

Search for business opportunities posted by buyers.

*How to search:*
1️⃣ Browse by Category
2️⃣ Search by Location
3️⃣ Browse by Urgency
4️⃣ View All Recent Leads
5️⃣ My Saved Searches _(Premium only)_
6️⃣ My Responses
0️⃣ Back to Main Menu" + tierNote + "

_Reply with a number (0-6)_"; return JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: sm.phone, type: "text", text: { preview_url: false, body } }); })() }}

parameters.name: filters
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const ad = JSON.parse($("State Machine").item.json.actionData || "{}"); const loc = ad.location || ""; const base = [["status","in",["Posted to Groups","Introductions Sent - Awaiting Vendor Response","Has Interested Vendors"]]]; if (loc && loc !== "All India") base.push(["location","like","%"+loc+"%"]); return JSON.stringify(base); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={"current_step": "LEAD_SELECT", "session_data": {{ JSON.stringify($("Format Location Lead List").item.json.sessionData) }}}

parameters.value: =[["status","in",["Posted to Groups","Introductions Sent - Awaiting Vendor Response","Has Interested Vendors"]],["is_active","=",1]]

parameters.jsonBody: ={"messaging_product":"whatsapp","to":"{{ $('Format Urgency Menu').item.json.phone }}","type":"text","text":{"preview_url":false,"body":{{ JSON.stringify($('Format Urgency Menu').item.json.msg) }}}}

parameters.name: filters
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const ad = JSON.parse($("State Machine").item.json.actionData || "{}"); const base = [["urgency","=",ad.urgency],["status","in",["Posted to Groups","Introductions Sent - Awaiting Vendor Response","Has Interested Vendors"]]]; if (!ad.isPremium && ad.cityState) { const city = (ad.cityState||"").split(",")[0].trim(); if (city) base.push(["location","like","%"+city+"%"]); } return JSON.stringify(base); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={"current_step": "LEAD_SELECT", "session_data": {{ JSON.stringify($("Format Urgency Lead List").item.json.sessionData) }}}

parameters.name: filters
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const ad = JSON.parse($("State Machine").item.json.actionData || "{}"); const since = new Date(Date.now() - 7*24*3600000).toISOString().split("T")[0]; const base = [["status","in",["Posted to Groups","Introductions Sent - Awaiting Vendor Response","Has Interested Vendors"]],["creation",">=",since]]; if (!ad.isPremium && ad.cityState) { const city = (ad.cityState||"").split(",")[0].trim(); if (city) base.push(["location","like","%"+city+"%"]); } return JSON.stringify(base); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={"current_step": "LEAD_SELECT", "session_data": {{ JSON.stringify($("Format Recent Lead List").item.json.sessionData) }}}

={{ (() => { const d = $("Format Recent Lead List").first().json; const msg = `📋 *ALL RECENT LEADS*

Showing leads from last 7 days
${d.headerNote}

${d.listLines}━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

${d.leads.length>0?"Reply with lead number for details
Or *MORE* for older leads
Or *0* to go back":"Reply *0* to go back"}${!d.isPremium?"

💡 Upgrade to Premium for all leads across India":""}`; return JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: d.phone, type: "text", text: { preview_url: false, body: msg } }); })() }}

parameters.name: filters
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const ad = JSON.parse($("State Machine").item.json.actionData || "{}"); const base = [["status","in",["Posted to Groups","Introductions Sent - Awaiting Vendor Response","Has Interested Vendors"]],["is_active","=",1]]; if (ad.category) base.push(["lead_type","=",ad.category]); if (ad.urgency) base.push(["urgency","=",ad.urgency]); if (ad.location && ad.location !== "All India") base.push(["location","like","%"+ad.location+"%"]); if (!ad.isPremium && ad.cityState && !ad.location && !ad.category) { const city = (ad.cityState||"").split(",")[0].trim(); if (city) base.push(["location","like","%"+city+"%"]); } return JSON.stringify(base); })() }}

={{ (() => { const d = $("Merge Save Search").first().json; const msg = `✅ *Search Saved!*

📌 Name: *${d.searchName}*
📊 Total saved searches: ${d.totalSearches}

Access anytime via Find Lead → My Saved Searches

Would you like daily alerts for new matching leads?
Reply *YES* to enable alerts
Reply *NO* to skip
Reply *0* to go back`; return JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: d.phone, type: "text", text: { preview_url: false, body: msg } }); })() }}
